Schedule.choosePropertySubtitle: Select the property for which you would like to schedule a cleaning.
Schedule.cleanerNotifiedDesc: After that, he can accept the invitation to start working on the chosen accommodation.
Schedule.timesAutoRetrieved: Times are automatically retrieved for the booking.
Schedule.noConfirmedCleaner: No confirmed cleaner for this property yet.
Schedule.selectPropertyAndCleaner: Select a property and a confirmed cleaner first.
Schedule.escrowNote: Your payment is then held in escrow. Once the cleaner completes the task, the payment is released to the cleaner.
Schedule.awaitingConfirmation: Your cleaning is scheduled and awaiting confirmation from {name}.
